arabic_text:
مولانا ھاشم
مولاتنا سلمیٰ (باب الابواب)
مولانا عبد المطلب
باب اعلیٰ
فاطمہ بنت عمر (باب الابواب)
باب ادنیٰ
عبد اللہ بن سباح (باب الابواب)
آمنہ بنت وہاب (باب الابواب)
ابو طالب
فاطمہ بنت اسد (باب الابواب)
عبد اللہ
محمد
علی
سلمان فارسی (باب الابواب)
خدیجہ (باب الابواب)
حسین ابن علیؓ
فاطمہ
english_text:
Our Master Hashim
Our Lady Salma (Door of Doors)
Our Master Abd al-Muttalib
Higher Door — Fatimah bint Umar (Door of Doors)
Lower Door — Abdullah bin Sabbah (Door of Doors)
Aminah bint Wahab (Door of Doors)
Abu Talib
Fatimah bint Asad (Door of Doors)
Abdullah
Muhammad
Ali
Salman al-Farisi (Door of Doors)
Khadijah (Door of Doors)
Husayn ibn Ali
Fatimah
alt_text: An extended 3-column table continuing the structure of image 025 across multiple generations. Top: Hashim → Salma (Baab al-Abwaab) → Abd al-Muttalib. Then for Abd al-Muttalib's generation: Higher Door = Fatimah bint Umar; Lower Door = Abdullah bin Sabbah; plus Aminah bint Wahab as another Baab al-Abwaab. Then: Abu Talib (with Fatimah bint Asad as his Baab al-Abwaab) | Abdullah | Muhammad. Then: Ali (with Salman al-Farisi as his Baab al-Abwaab) | Khadijah (Baab al-Abwaab). Bottom: Husayn ibn Ali | Fatimah.
notes: Complete genealogical-spiritual table for the Prophetic House: every prominent figure paired with their corresponding Baab al-Abwaab (Door of Doors). Pairs with image 026 (the ordered-distribution flow diagram) and image 025 (the Abd al-Muttalib mini-table).
